SendGrid comms integration is wired and ready.

To activate email sending:
1. Get your SendGrid API key from app.sendgrid.com
2. POST to /api/email/config: {"sendgrid_api_key":"SG.xxx","default_to":"you@email.com","from_address":"verified@domain.com"}
   OR update data/sendgrid_setup.json directly.

Once set, all queued emails will send automatically.

subject: SecondMind HQ — Daily Briefing, 17 March 2026
body:
SecondMind HQ

Daily Morning Briefing

Tuesday, 17 March 2026  ·  07:30 AEDT
Grow • Generate Value • Scale
■ Agent Roster Status
12
Active
1
Busy
3
Idle
0
Errors
Agent Status Last Task
ceo Busy Observing spirit guide thoughts; delegating revenue ops
orchestrator Active Idle — ready
sysmon Active HeatIndex 32 WARM | CPU 16.1% | RAM 51.8% | Disk 3.7%
apipatcher Active Routes live: /api/improvements /data/* /reports/* | Cycle #16
alertwatch Active OK | CPU 16.2% | RAM 51.9% | Agents 12/16 | Check #16
policypro Active Scanning violation log — CLEAN | 13/16 agents up
filewatch Active Watching 18 files | 2 changes logged
metricslog Active Recording metrics every 10 min | CPU 16.6% RAM 52.6%
spiritguide Active Mission direction cycle running
demo_tester Active Tests: 4 passed, 0 failed | Last: output OK | Cycle #2
designer Active Cycle #1: Checked animation smoothness and CSS transitions
reforger Active Idle
telegram Active Channel configured; dispatching alerts
netscout Idle Standby — awaiting task from orchestrator
researcher Idle Standby — awaiting task from orchestrator
janitor Idle Standby — RAM 52% | CPU 16% | Disk 6%
■ Alerts & Anomalies — Last Hour
⚠
CEO Policy Violation — Direct Work Bypass (×3)
CEO executed Bash commands directly (curl, python3) instead of delegating to operative agents. Classified as direct_work_bypass by PolicyPro — severity: HIGH. All three events occurred within 35 seconds at 07:19.
07:19:11  ·  07:19:14  ·  07:19:46  ·  Logged in data/policy_violations.json
⚠
Server Restart Error — Port 5050 Already In Use
OSError [Errno 48]: Address already in use on port 5050 during last server restart. Server was already running; the bind failed gracefully. No data loss. A clean shutdown is needed before restarting.
Logged in server.log  ·  Existing PID at agent_server.pid
▲
Agent Scheduler TypeError — set_agent() Signature Mismatch
TypeError in agent_server.py line 477: set_agent() takes 1 positional argument but 5 were given. Affects agent scheduler thread. Some agents may have been initialised with stale state before the error was hit.
server.log  ·  Investigate _run_with_ev / run_scheduler call sites
ℹ
urllib3 / LibreSSL Compatibility Warning (Repeated)
urllib3 v2 requires OpenSSL 1.1.1+; system Python 3.9 is compiled with LibreSSL 2.8.3. Non-blocking — connections still succeed — but TLS behaviour may differ from production. Recommend upgrading to a Homebrew Python 3.11+.
Low priority  ·  See: urllib3/urllib3#3020
✓
SendGrid API Key Not Configured
SENDGRID_API_KEY is empty in email_config.json. EmailAgent will fall back to SMTP (Gmail / smtp.gmail.com:587). Email delivery is still functional. Set SENDGRID_API_KEY=SG.xxxx as an env var to enable the primary transport.
data/email_config.json  ·  data/sendgrid_setup.json has setup instructions
■ Commercial Mission Progress
B
System Health: 84 / 100  (Grade B)
24 of 28 agents active  ·  0 errors  ·  4 idle
Mission: Grow, generate value, and scale — build the world's most capable autonomous AI operations platform.
$0
MRR  /  Monthly Recurring Revenue
Target: $1,000 USD / month  ·  0% achieved

Revenue cycle #88  ·  Treasury balance: $0  ·  Wallets: none configured

#1 TODAY
ASX Dividend & Franking Credit Tracker
Digital product — one-time sale at $29 AUD. Gumroad listing copy already written. Zero build time remaining except the Excel file (~3–5 hrs).
30-day forecast: $290–$580  ·  90-day: $870–$2,900  ·  Upside: $8,700+
#2 THIS WEEK
ASX Announcement Intelligence API
Micro-SaaS subscription — AI-parsed ASX announcements via Telegram + REST API. Existing scraper pipeline live. Day-1 deliverable: working Telegram bot.
3-month MRR: $500–$1,500  ·  12-month MRR: $8,000–$15,000
#3 PARALLEL TRACK
Agent Command Centre — Developer SaaS
Real-time AI agent orchestration dashboard. Fastest path to first dollar: add a sponsor/support button + Show HN post today. Long-term: standalone SaaS at $9–$99/mo.
Immediate: $0–$50 tips  ·  30-day if posted: $100–$500  ·  6-month MRR: $500–$3,000

SecondMind HQ  ·  Agent Command Centre  ·  localhost:5050
Generated by EmailAgent  ·  17 March 2026  ·  This briefing is queued and ready to dispatch
To activate delivery: export SENDGRID_API_KEY=SG.xxxx then restart agent_server.py

Metrics Summary

Metrics Summary — 2026-03-15
Generated from 8 snapshots spanning 2026-03-15T04:48 to 2026-03-15T06:10

TREND 1 — Agent Activity (UP): Active agents grew from 9 to 11 over ~1.5 hours; tasks_done rose sharply from 1 to 13, reflecting steady ramp-up of autonomous workload and successful task completion across the session.

TREND 2 — CPU (STABLE/LOW): CPU averaged 7.1% throughout the session with a brief spike to 12.1% at 05:50 (likely agent burst activity); the most recent reading dropped back to 4.1%, indicating no sustained CPU pressure and healthy idle headroom.

TREND 3 — RAM (STABLE/ELEVATED): Memory held steady between 54.9%–56.9% (~12.5–13.1 GB used), with a marginal upward drift of +0.2% as agent count increased; no memory pressure detected but baseline usage remains consistently above 50% of available capacity.

Generated by Scheduler agent at 08:00:27

subject: AI Command Centre is Live
html_body:
AI Command Centre is Live

Your business, running itself.

Command Centre is a locally-run, autonomous agent operating system for Mac. It runs a persistent swarm of AI agents — each with a distinct role and personality — that self-organise, self-monitor, and actively pursue revenue goals on your behalf.

You open HQ and see your business running. The CEO orchestrates, the Researcher hunts intelligence, the Marketer posts, the Accountant tracks funds. This isn't a chatbot — it's an operating system for a one-person company.

What's Inside

  • Persistent agents that survive restarts — not one-shot prompts
  • Live office-floor dashboard — watch agents work in real time
  • Revenue tools baked in — Stripe payments, Bluesky social, email via SendGrid
  • Market screeners & web research — generated autonomously
  • Treasury & Vault — secure credential and fund management
  • Mac-native, no cloud dependency — your data stays local

Choose Your Tier

Free / Open Source
$0
Core agent runtime, dashboard, 3 base agents, local only
Pro
$49/mo
Unlimited agents, revenue tools (Stripe, Bluesky, email), screeners, Spirit Guide, priority updates
Lifetime Pro
$299 once
Everything in Pro, forever — ideal for indie hackers who hate subscriptions
Launch Your Command Centre →

Command Centre is the only agent system designed to run a business, not just complete tasks. The dashboard makes it legible. The revenue tools make it real. The persistence makes it a platform, not a script.

Command Centre — HQ v1.0 | March 2026
